horizontal_fov_isaac_degrees_note: Isaac ``CameraProperties.horizontal_fov`` is set in degrees (bindings default 90).
depth_meters_float32_npy_layout: HxW row-major; same shape as RGB
depth_meters_float32_note: Primary metric depth: float32 positive ray length from Isaac IMAGE_DEPTH (abs taken in capture). Use with cam_K for unprojection; prefer this over PNG when you need full range without saturation.

depth_preview_info.depth_preview_note: Visualization only: disparity-normalized to [0,255]. Use depth_meters_float32_npy or depth_png_uint16mm for linear metric depth.
